title: Stampede
description: At the end of your turn, [blue]1[/blue] random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is played against a random enemy.
smart_description: At the end of your turn, [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Hand[/gold] {Amount:plural:is played against a random enemy.|are played against a random enemy.}
